description_long: This is a stylized adult female pedestrian with a casual urban appearance. She wears a short-sleeved t-shirt featuring a cartoon graphic on the chest, paired with fitted jeans and low-top sneakers. Her posture is upright and relaxed, with arms slightly bent and hands open at her sides. She has long, straight hair that falls past her shoulders and wears glasses with a rectangular frame. The figure's proportions and attire suggest a modern, everyday city dweller. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing a casual, approachable look.
description: A casually dressed adult woman with glasses, long hair, a graphic t-shirt, jeans, and sneakers, standing upright in a relaxed pose.
description_view_0: Front view shows the graphic t-shirt, glasses, facial features, and both arms extended slightly outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the drape of the hair, and the fit of the t-shirt and jeans.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hair, the fit of the t-shirt and jeans, and the backs of the sneakers.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, hair, and side of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: casual t-shirt and jeans with low-top footwear and glasses
attribute_hairstyle: long straight hair with side part
